overview: A mobile-responsive School Management App serving three user roles — Admin, Teacher, and Student/Parent — through a single Internet Identity login with smart role detection. Centralizes student records, fees management, attendance, homework, marks, notices, and analytics in one platform.
features: Role-based login (Admin / Teacher / Student) with Internet Identity
Admin Panel: student & teacher management, fees tracking, attendance, notices, analytics
Teacher Panel: homework management, marks entry, attendance marking, assigned class view
Student/Parent Panel: profile, marks with performance graph, fees status, attendance log, notices
Document upload for students with persistent file storage
PDF report cards and fee receipts
Mobile-first UI with bottom navigation and dashboard cards
